title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, a cloud platform enabling AI agents to build, deploy, and run software in real Ubuntu environments with database, storage, and deployment capabilities. The platform integrates Claude and Gemini models with GitHub, AWS, terminal access, and one-click HTTPS deployment to bridge the gap between code generation and live application deployment.
